subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! I know not what Thou hast ordained for me nor what is written down by Thy Most Exalted Pen
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الاسماء اذ کان بین ایدی الاعدآء الذین نقضوا عهد الله و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @petitions to authorities, @prayer for service, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @presence of; reunion with God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
